title: FIX MY PINGGGGG
description: Makes sure that as long as you have internet, you will be able to both PING and CONNECT to the server.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/336df378a6b9c294c93c8dbfd9cfd27e0a1f8841.png)

---

## Features

- **Always‑working server pings** – As long as you have an active internet connection, the mod ensures every server is pinged correctly.
- **No more “connecting to server” hangs** – Join servers immediately without waiting through long connecting messages.
- **Fixes stale network routes** – Resolves the issue where Minecraft keeps using an old IP route after you switch Wi‑Fi, change your IP, use a VPN, or toggle your network.

---

### Disclaimer

This mod does **NOT** make server pings look fancier – it **fixes bugs and issues instead!**

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BT6mW9szmWs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

_Every server is pinged properly – I'm so happy :D_

![Every server pinged properly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b2c4c3fbb7e16863f7995bd8a9b2f591e520173.png)

---

### Author's Note

If you've ever switched your IP, connected to another Wi‑Fi, used a VPN (and then closed it), and later found that server pings stopped working – that's because Minecraft still tries to use the old network route. I personally use a VPN, and every single time I needed to join a server that blocks VPNs, I had to close the VPN, toggle my Wi‑Fi, and hope pings would work again. Most of the time it failed.

This bug exists in **every** Minecraft version – I can't believe it was never fixed. Maybe it's just me, but just in case anyone else has the same problem, I made this mod. **This mod fixes the issue – pings will always work as long as your internet works.**
